title: The Orb Of Dominance Mod
description: Finally, a mod that allows you to craft and use the Orb Of Dominance from Minecraft Dungeons!
body:
Have you always dreamed of ruling over the villagers? Well now you can with this simple mod that adds a craftable and controlable Orb Of Dominance from Minecraft Dungeons!

The orb doesn't do anything on its own, but when crafted into a staff, you can right click the air to shoot three fireballs, right click a block to summon an iron golem at the cost of a much longer cooldown, or press tab to teleport in the direction you're facing! It also allows permanit flight when you first hold it. Things get complicated when you die though, becuase although the staff will regenerate your health, it will break and the Arch Avatar (essentialy a controlable Heart of Ender) will spawn! you cannot dismount, or build once inside this creature, but you can right click to make it shoot bombs and left click to teleport. When the avatar dies, the orb will shatter into five shards that spread within a hundred block away. But don't worry, because you can reasemble the shards in a crafting table!

Ever felt like the end is too dangerous esspecialy with mods? Then drop the staff while in the end and another version of the Arch Avatar will spawn: the Void Crawler. With the strength of a warden and the speed of a horse, this creature will take out endermen in seconds! Want your staff back? Left click the crawler (you also get it back when it dies).

I also added the Crown Of Dominance (Arch-Illager's crown) which gives you the hero of the village effect when worn.

Credit to blockbench, mcreator, fandom, FL Studio Mobile, and Apple Music.

Versions 1.2.3 to 1.3.13 reqire moremcmeta emissive textures

As of July 27th I will not be uploading updates for versions 1.21.1 or 1.21.4 due to the discovery of the mod cuasing issues on those versions that I don't know how to fix. I recommend not to download any updates above 1.2.8 for neoforge.
